title: Create Peak Engineering
body:
Create Peak Engineering – The Ultimate Create Mod Modpack!

If you have bugs or ideas idk join my dc channel [very high quality.]

### **_(I will update this modpack to Create 6.0 once all the Create addons support it 18.04.2026 Still mods that dont fully support 6.08)_** Maaybe not im lazy

Create Peak Engineering is a meticulously crafted Create-focused modpack designed for players who love automation, engineering, and immersive quality-of-life enhancements. With a vast array of Create add-ons, performance optimizations, and slice-of-life improvements, this pack provides a smooth, engaging, and deeply customizable experience.


Key Features:
🛠 Expanded Create Mod – Featuring add-ons like Create: Slice & Dice, Create Big Cannons, Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Create Deco, and many more to push mechanical creativity to new heights!

🔍 Exploration & Worldbuilding – Biomes O' Plenty, Supplementaries, Quark, Spelunkery, and various structure-enhancing mods make the world feel alive.

💨 Performance & Optimization – FerriteCore, Embeddium, ImmediatelyFast, Oculus, and Dynamic FPS ensure smooth gameplay.

📦 Storage & Utility Mods – Sophisticated Backpacks, Tom’s Simple Storage, Jade, and JEI streamline inventory and crafting.

🎭 Immersion & Visual Upgrades – Connected Glass, Sound Physics Remastered, 3D Skin Layers, Not Enough Animations, and more bring realism and depth.

🎙 Multiplayer Enhancements – Simple Voice Chat, Open Parties and Claims, and Carry On make cooperative play seamless.

⚙ Customization & Future Expansions – Includes KubeJS Create, Kotlin for Forge, and potential future updates with custom recipes and mechanics!


Installation Requirement:
✅ Must be installed on both client and server for full functionality.

Whether you’re a seasoned engineer or a newcomer to Create, this modpack delivers the peak experience for automation, exploration, and quality-of-life enhancements. Are you ready to build the factory of your dreams? 🚀
